title: Garlicky British Cottage Pie
description: A comforting, savory dish featuring a crispy mashed potato topping, a moist beef filling infused with the flavors of garlic, romano pepper, and yuzu-cure, all within a sugar-free framework.

ingredients.name: Yuzu-Cure
ingredients.notes: Make sure to use a sugar-free yuzu-cure.

ingredients.name: Mashed Potatoes
ingredients.notes: Choose high-moisture, high-starch potatoes for best results.

instructions: In a large pan over medium-high heat, cook the ground beef until browned. Drain excess fat.
Add the chopped onion, garlic, and romano pepper to the pan and continue to cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the yuzu-cure and stir to combine. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato paste, beef broth, and flour to the pan, stirring to combine. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the sauce thickens.
Transfer the beef mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish. Spread the mashed potatoes evenly over the top.
Sprinkle the grated cheddar cheese over the mashed potatoes. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake the cottage pie in the preheated oven for 35 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden brown and the filling is hot and bubbly.
